intended_use: Hermes is intended for use as a software interface and image segmentation system for the transfer of medical imaging information to an output file. It is also intended as preoperative software for dia
intended_use_full: Hermes is intended for use as a software interface and image segmentation system for the transfer of medical imaging information to an output file. It is also intended as preoperative software for diagnostic and surgical planning. For these purposes, output files can also be used for the fabrication of physical replicas using traditional or additive manufacturing methods. The physical replicas can be used for diagnostic purposes in the field of orthopedic applications. The software is intended to be used in conjunction with other diagnostic tools and expert clinical judgment.
target_condition: Osteoarthritis of the knee; orthopedic surgical planning
ground_truth: Manual segmentation and comparison to predicate autosegmentation tools (Synopsys Simpleware and Materialize Mimics 24); validation reviewed by Chief of Radiology at Hospital for Special Surgery
other_metrics: Dice Similarity Coefficient (Dice score) comparison to Synopsys Simpleware and Materialize Mimics 24 autosegmentation models
